title: Palamu Fort
tagline: Palamu Fort — heritage city of Jharkhand

overview.short: The Palamu Fort are two ruined forts located 3 k.m from Betla National Park, Latehar district on the bank of Auranga River, in the Indian state of Jharkhand.
overview.description: The Palamu Fort are two ruined forts located 3 k.m from Betla National Park, Latehar district on the bank of Auranga River, in the Indian state of Jharkhand. The original fort in the plains and the other on an adjoining hill are attributed to the kings of the Chero dynasty. The fort in the plains had defences on three sides and three main gates. The New fort was constructed by Raja Medini Ray.

topPlaces.name: Satbarwa block
topPlaces.description: Satbarwa block is one of the administrative blocks of Palamu district, Jharkhand state, India. It is one of the important block/Taliuka in NH-75 (old numbering).

topPlaces.name: Betla National Park
topPlaces.description: Betla National Park is a national park located in the Latehar and Palamu district of Jharkhand, India. Its the only national park in the state.

topPlaces.name: Polpol
topPlaces.description: Polpol is a village of Palamau district, situated 16 km from the nearest district town, Medininagar. National Highway 39 crosses this village.

items.note: Satbarwa block is one of the administrative blocks of Palamu district, Jharkhand state, India. It is one of the important block/Taliuka in NH-75 (old numbering).
Betla National Park is a national park located in the Latehar and Palamu district of Jharkhand, India. Its the only national park in the state.
Polpol is a village of Palamau district, situated 16 km from the nearest district town, Medininagar. National Highway 39 crosses this village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Palamu Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Palamu Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Palamu Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gaya International Airport (119 km) and the nearest railway station is Ranchi Junction (126 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Palamu Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Palamu Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Palamu Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Palamu Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Palamu Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Satbarwa block, Betla National Park, Polpol.
